demographics.living_situation: supported accommodation facility; wheelchair-dependent and reliant on carers for transfers and hygiene

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My belly's gone rock hard and I'm soaked through with wee — the pads are drenched. I've got a pounding headache, I'm dripping with sweat and my face is all flushed. Something feels really wrong.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I've been struggling to pass water for a couple of days and now the headache and sweating have come on tonight and it's frightening.

symptom_narrative.onset: trouble passing water started about 48 hours ago; the pounding headache, sweating and flushing came on this evening
symptom_narrative.duration: two days of not being able to pass water properly; headache and sweats for the last little while tonight
symptom_narrative.character: constant dribbling of urine that soaks my pads, a rock-hard swollen lower belly, a pounding headache, drenching sweat and a flushed face and neck
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the headache is really bad and the sweating is drenching — this feels worse than my usual bladder troubles
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the bladder trouble built up over two days; the headache, sweats and flushing came on tonight and aren't easing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just seems to keep building
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: because of my spinal injury I can't feel my bladder at all, so I don't get any warning it's full; my carer says the urine has gone cloudy and smells bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm in a wheelchair and rely on my carers for everything, so they're helping me through this

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a spinal cord injury from an accident years ago — I'm paralysed and use a wheelchair
past_medical_history.how_managed: ongoing disability support and carer assistance

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a bladder that doesn't work properly because of my spinal injury — I can't feel when it's full
past_medical_history.how_managed: usually managed with a fixed timed toileting schedule

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a regular medication for my bladder muscles

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in a supported accommodation facility, wheelchair-dependent, relies on carers for transfers and lower-body hygiene; the disability support worker is present and made this call

objective_data_offered.value: a pounding, throbbing headache that came on this evening and won't ease
face and neck look flushed and red; he is visibly sweating heavily over the head and upper body and looks distressed
his lower abdomen looks and feels rock-hard, tense and swollen up toward the belly button
the incontinence pads are continuously soaking with urine that keeps dribbling; several drenched pads already in the bin
the urine has turned cloudy and smells strong and foul this evening
